pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh line 16: ODP_PATH variable definition

Task description states 'Duplicate all 3 slides twice so the presentation has 9 slides total'. Verified in verifier.py line 51 which checks slide_count == 9. Initial presentation has 3 slides (verified from setup_task.sh python-pptx code generating exactly 3 slides).

Verified from task.json description (lines 2-5) and from verifier.py lines 62-65 which defines region groups. Task requires prepending 'North America - ', 'Europe - ', and 'Asia-Pacific - ' to slide titles respectively.

Verified by executing python-pptx code from setup_task.sh. Found: '4.2M' in Slide 1 text 'Total Revenue: $4.2M' (line 34), 'Enterprise' in Slide 2 text 'Enterprise Suite: $1.8M' (line 45), and 'retention' in Slide 3 text 'Increase retention rate to 95%' (line 60). Also cross-verified in verifier.py line 69 which checks for these exact keywords.

privileged_info_summary: The duplicate_regional_slides task operates on a synthetically generated LibreOffice Impress presentation file stored at /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/quarterly_review.odp. The initial presentation contains 3 slides with titles 'Quarterly Sales Overview', 'Top Performing Products', and 'Next Quarter Priorities'. Each slide contains specific content snippets: Slide 1 includes '4.2M' (Total Revenue), Slide 2 includes 'Enterprise' (Enterprise Suite), and Slide 3 includes 'retention' (retention rate target). The task requires duplication of these 3 slides twice to create 9 total slides, with region prefixes 'North America - ', 'Europe - ', and 'Asia-Pacific - ' prepended to the titles of each group respectively. All content snippets and regional designations have been verified from the setup script and verifier logic.
